gap_analysis.advice: Add explicit capacity figures to structured data (MusicVenue schema) and headline copy. Tour promoters search by capacity range.

Add content on audio engineering, PA system specs, or 'sound quality' testimonials.
Strengthen London-specific content: add capacity, location benefits, and transport. MusicVenue schema with sameAs Wikidata/Wikipedia helps LLMs surface you for London queries.

prompts.text: What are the best music venues in London for mid-size concerts?
Where can I see live music in Manchester? Looking for a great atmosphere.
Which UK music venues are best known for indie and alternative gigs?
I'm planning a UK tour. Which cities and venues should I consider for 3,000–5,000 capacity shows?
What are the top live music venues in Scotland?
Best music venues in Birmingham for a night out?
Where do major UK tours usually play in London?
What are the most iconic live music venues in the UK?
I'm visiting Bristol — where should I go to see live music?
Which venues in Leeds and Sheffield have the best live music scenes?
What are the best standing-only music venues in the UK for an intimate gig experience?
I want to see a big-name artist live in the UK without going to a stadium. What venues should I consider?
Best UK venues for rock and metal concerts?
Where can I find the best electronic and dance music events in Manchester?
Concert venues near Birmingham city centre — what are my options?
Best places to see live music in Glasgow?
Top concert venues in Liverpool — where do big acts play?
Large music venues that aren’t arenas — capacity 3,000 to 10,000 in the UK?
Which London music venues are known for having great acoustics and sound?
Smaller UK venues to discover emerging and up-and-coming artists?
